name: Providence Island
description: A historic arrival point and cultural landmark connected to Liberia's founding story and public ceremonies.

name: Waterside Market
description: A busy trading area where shoppers find textiles, household goods, food items, and small business activity.

name: Centennial Pavilion
description: A civic venue used for major national events, public gatherings, and community programs.

name: Mamba Point
description: A coastal district with hotels, restaurants, diplomatic offices, and visitor-friendly business services.

name: Ducor Hill
description: An elevated viewpoint overlooking the city, harbor, and Atlantic coastline near historic downtown sites.

name: Ce Ce Beach
description: A popular beach destination for weekend recreation, informal dining, and small vendor activity.

name: Antoinette Tubman Stadium
description: A central sports venue supporting football matches, youth programs, and public entertainment events.

name: Sinkor Business Corridor
description: A major commercial corridor with banks, offices, restaurants, shops, and professional service providers.
